"[5] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY ISSUED IN HAWTHORNE: EB AND WB LANES OF EL SEGUNDO BLVD BETWEEN BIRCH AVE AND HAWTHORNE BLVD WILL BE CLOSED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF HAWTORNE POLICE DEPARTMENT INCIDENT 26-2120. "
